description: §51.0.J E-DERIVED-ENGINE-NO-WRITE for a direct write inside a derived engine's own state-child body. `<Healthy><button onclick=${ @health = .AtRisk }></>` inside a `derived=` engine is rejected with E-DERIVED-ENGINE-NO-WRITE. Previously fire-site #10 fired E-ENGINE-INVALID-TRANSITION with self-contradictory 'add rule=' advice (rule= on a derived engine is itself E-DERIVED-ENGINE-NO-RULES).
rationale: §51.0.J: the state-child-body direct-write fire-site must consult the derived-engine metadata and fire E-DERIVED-ENGINE-NO-WRITE (the variable is read-only) instead of E-ENGINE-INVALID-TRANSITION, whose remedy contradicts §51.0.J.
